headline: Pfizer Inc. (PFE): A Top Dividend Stock to Buy According to Hedge Funds amid Ibrance FDA Milestone
summary: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) is one of the best dividend stocks to buy, according to hedge funds. On June 24, the US Food and Drug Administration approved the use of Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE)’s Ibrance in combination with trastuzumab as a maintenance option for patients with HR-positive, HER2-positive locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer after induction treatment. […]
